description: Sutensai acolyte administers mandatory resonance alignment test to travelers
Sutensai-aligned Ironclad escorts party through the reach; evaluating them
Party invited to undertake a minor temple trial; reward is a certification mark
Local scholar challenges party understanding of the Sutensai revelation
Disguised Korrath scout mapping Iron Teeth defenses
A priest breaks orthodoxy to share a secret about the Hollow Author in the Order
Cryptic message delivered from the presumed leader of the Sutensai Order
Creature that feeds on resonance energy attacks near the temple perimeter
Two Ironclad units with conflicting oath interpretations ask party to arbitrate
Party gains access to historical records about the prior Convergence cycle
